examples: Like conversate above, irregardless isn't actually a word.
Irregardless has been used so often that it actually is in the dictionary now and that's kind of sad.
The Ajax engine allows a user's interaction with the application to happen simultaneously, irregardless of the actions of the server.
So regardless (not irregardless) of whether a company would refuse to hire for poor grammar, why not take the opportunity as an employee or as an entrepreneur to hone this skill?
